nasb.text: You shall say to them, ‘This is the offering by fire which you shall offer to the Lord: two male lambs one year old without defect as a continual burnt offering every day.

esv.text: And you shall say to them, This is the food offering that you shall offer to the Lord: two male lambs a year old without blemish, day by day, as a regular offering.

cnv.text: 你又要對他們說：‘你們要獻給耶和華的火祭是這樣：沒有殘疾、一歲的公羊羔，每天兩隻，作為常獻的燔祭。

ccb.text: 以下是他们要献给耶和华的火祭。 “每天两只毫无残疾、一岁的公羊羔作燔祭，
